intro: Between April 13 and April 21, 2026, ZCyberNews published 15 articles on privilege escalation. The coverage detailed 13 high-severity, one critical, and one medium-severity vulnerability. Key exploits included CVE-2026-5490 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-25203, CVE-2026-33104, CVE-2026-34054, and CVE-2026-5424. The threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was prominently observed leveraging these flaws. Incidents affected sectors globally, with education, digital signage, enterprise, government, and healthcare organizations most frequently targeted.
